source: merged Ark Pixel 12px Monospaced BDF v2026.05.07: zh_cn + ja + zh_tw; zh_tw overrides conflicts; patched missing CJK glyphs using fallback rasterizer
family: Ark Pixel 12px Monospaced Merged Trad Priority

mergePolicy.description: When the same Unicode codepoint appears in multiple sources, later sources replace earlier sources. Traditional Chinese zh_tw is applied last.

Mona12Emoji.description: single-codepoint 12x12 monochrome emoji glyphs treated like kanji (advance 12, same cell/baseline); emoji format controls stored as zero-width blanks; LED bitmap yOffset -1 places emoji one row lower
